common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.name: Full name
auth.avatarRequirements: PNG, JPG, or WEBP up to 5 MB.

project.createFirst: Create your first workspace and start writing with context-aware AI.

editor.recoveredUnsavedChanges: Recovered unsaved changes from a previous session.

noChapter.title: No chapters yet
noChapter.description: Add a chapter to start writing.

comment.label: Your comment
comment.placeholder: Share your thoughts on this passage...
comment.hint: Comments are visible to all collaborators.

collaboration.syncTimedOut: Live collaboration took too long to initialize. Editing locally for now.
collaboration.authFailed: Live collaboration authorization failed. Editing locally for now.
collaboration.reconnectExhausted: Live collaboration is offline. Reconnect to resume shared editing.
collaboration.localFallback: Live collaboration is unavailable for this chapter right now. The body is editing locally and save works normally.

conflict.title: Save conflict
conflict.description: This chapter was modified by another session. Your changes haven't been saved.

illustration.label: Chapter Illustration
illustration.emptyDescription: Generate a cover-style illustration from the live chapter draft and optional art direction.
illustration.customInstructionPlaceholder: Example: rain-soaked neo-noir painting, lantern glow, no visible faces
illustration.generateError: Could not generate the illustration. Please try again.
illustration.missingChapterContent: Add chapter content before generating an illustration.
illustration.readOnlyHint: You can view illustrations here, but only editors can generate them.

history.writeLoading: Generating a continuation for your chapter...
history.writeError: Could not generate the continuation. Please try again.
history.rewriteError: Could not rewrite the selected text. Please try again.
history.describeError: Could not generate the description. Please try again.
history.brainstormError: Could not generate brainstorming ideas. Please try again.

sidebar.createBranchDialogDescription: Create an alternate story line. You can write new chapters independently from the main branch.
sidebar.createBranchError: Could not create the branch. Try again.
sidebar.createFirstChapter: Create your first chapter in {branch} with New.
sidebar.noChaptersInBranch: This branch does not have any chapters yet.

zen.toolbarHint: Move cursor to the top to show the toolbar

dashboard.removedAccess: You no longer have access to “{projectName}”.
dashboard.noPublicProjects: No public projects yet. Publish one from the Projects panel to share it.
dashboard.deleteProjectDescription: This permanently deletes the workspace and all of its chapters, characters, outlines, and AI history. Collaborators will lose access immediately. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteFailed: Failed to delete project. Please try again.

storyBible.title: Story Bible
storyBible.description: Track the key details of your story's world to improve AI suggestions or fill it up step-by-step to grow your idea into a first draft.
storyBible.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

placeholders.braindump: Write a braindump of everything you know about the story. You can include information about plot, characters, worldbuilding, theme - anything!
placeholders.genre: What genre are you writing in? Feel free to include sub-genres and tropes.
placeholders.synopsis: Introduce the characters, their goals, and the central conflict, while conveying the story's tone, themes, and unique elements.
placeholders.characterMemory: What should the story always remember about this character?
placeholders.worldbuildingElement: Describe a place, rule, system, taboo, or important lore fact.
placeholders.actSummary: What changes or escalates during this act?
placeholders.chapterSummary: What should happen in this outline chapter?

actions.startManualAct: or start by adding an act manually

empty.charactersDescription: Add protagonists, allies, or antagonists so the project keeps track of who matters.
empty.worldbuildingDescription: Capture rules, places, magic systems, technologies, or social norms that the story should remember.
empty.outlineChapters: No outline chapters yet for this act.

labels.name: Name
labels.chapterCountHint: The AI will decide the number of acts and divide chapters accordingly.

dialogs.characterDescription: Capture the character details this project should remember.
dialogs.elementDescription: Save a world rule, setting detail, or other lore element.
dialogs.actDescription: Define the big movement of the story.
dialogs.chapterDescription: Add a planning chapter inside a specific act. This does not create a real workspace chapter.
dialogs.generateOutlineDescription: Specify how many chapters you want the AI to generate. The AI will determine the number of acts automatically.

confirm.replaceSynopsisDescription: Generating a new synopsis will overwrite the text currently in the Synopsis section.
confirm.replaceOutlineDescription: Generating a new outline will replace the acts and outline chapters you already have.
confirm.deleteCharacterDescription: This removes the character from the Story Bible. It does not rewrite existing chapters.
confirm.deleteActDescription: Deleting an act also removes every outline chapter nested inside it.
confirm.deleteChapterDescription: This removes the outline chapter from the current act.

validation.characterRequired: Character name, role, and memory are required.
validation.chooseAct: Choose an act for this outline chapter.

aiPane.emptyHistoryDescription: Highlight text and use AI tools to generate suggestions. They will appear here as cards.
aiPane.emptyChatDescription: Ask me anything about your story, brainstorm ideas, or ask for help with continuity.
aiPane.streamError: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

versionHistory.title: Version History
versionHistory.intro: Showing the last 20 saved checkpoints for {chapterTitle}.
versionHistory.emptyDescription: Checkpoints are created when you click Save or restore a version.

presence.title: Presence
presence.empty: No collaborators are active in this workspace right now.

members.title: Members
members.leaveDialogDescription: You will immediately lose access to this project and return to the dashboard.
members.removeDialogDescription: This removes {memberName} from the workspace immediately. Their existing chapters, comments, and history stay intact.

invites.title: Pending invites
invites.inviteSubtitle: Bring a friend into the draft

comments.selectChapter: Select a chapter to review comments.
comments.detachedHint: This anchor no longer exists in the chapter.
comments.focusHint: Selecting this thread focuses the anchored text in the editor.
comments.noThreadDescription: Create a comment from selected text in the editor, then review it here with the rest of the team.

allProjects.title: Explore Projects
allProjects.subtitle: Manage your workspaces and discover stories
allProjects.emptyHelp: Try adjusting your filters or creating something new.
allProjects.endOfLibrary: You've reached the end of the public library.

peopleView.title: People
peopleView.noDiscovered: No new people to discover right now.

friendsView.title: Friends
friendsView.noFriends: No friends yet. Use People to send friend requests.
friendsView.chooseFriendDescription: Select one of your connected friends from the sidebar to open a private chat.

createProject.description: Create a new writing project by entering a title and choosing its visibility.
createProject.titlePlaceholder: What's the name of your story?
createProject.privateDescription: Only you and collaborators can view this project.
createProject.publicDescription: Anyone with the link can read this project.
createProject.missingStarterChapter: Project creation returned no starter chapter.

routeErrors.projectNotFoundDescription: We couldn't find the workspace you're looking for. It may have been deleted or you don't have access.
routeErrors.workspaceErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred in the workspace.

preferences.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
